forbidden_changes: do not treat partial_progress as success_like
do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
do not only scale all coefficients
do not remove approach_progress or near_stage_stability
required_changes: restructure terminal bonuses (safe_landing_bonus, intermediate_safe_bonus) with progressive, continuous thresholds that become more stringent as the lander approaches the pad
restructure gated_timeout_penalty to only penalize trajectories with negligible progress (delta_dist <= 0 and curr_dist > 0.5)
ensure new terminal bonus components have nonzero firing rates and positive alignment with partial_progress > failure preferences
mutation_intent_used.remove_or_gate_components_notes: gated_timeout_penalty should be gated to negligible progress only; gated_failure_penalty can be removed if ineffective

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
